calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner J.P. Morgan Securities Llc?S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Feb-26-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER J.P. MORGAN SECURITIES LLC Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner J.P. Morgan Securities Llc?S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment.

Petitioner J.P. Morgan Securities LLC's unopposed Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon is GRANTED. Good cause appearing, the Petition to Confirm the Arbitrators' Award is granted and the arbitration is confirmed in its entirety and Judgment shall be entered consistent with the Award, including an order to expunge from Byrne's CRD records all references to Occurrence Number 2264504.

Order and Judgment are signed..

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
